name: Invoke-Obfuscation VAR++ LAUNCHER OBFUSCATION - Security
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Invoke-Obfuscation VAR++ LAUNCHER OBFUSCATION - Security
SIGMA Description: Detects Obfuscated Powershell via VAR++ LAUNCHER

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%&&set%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%cmd%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%/c%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%-f%') AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%{0}%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%{1}%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%{2}%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%{3}%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%{4}%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%{5}%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Invoke-Obfuscation VAR++ LAUNCHER OBFUSCATION - Security on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%&&set%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%cmd%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%/c%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%-f%') AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%{0}%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%{1}%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%{2}%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%{3}%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%{4}%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%{5}%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Invoke-Obfuscation VAR++ LAUNCHER OBFUSCATION - Security
